user.title: Modbus Virtual Sensor
user.description: Serve aggregated Home Assistant sensors to a Modbus master over an RS485↔TCP bridge (e.g. an Elfin EW11). Next you'll add one or more zones.

data_description.host: IP of the RS485↔TCP bridge (the netp TCP-server socket).
data_description.unit: The slave address the master polls (e.g. 13).

zone.title: Add a zone
zone.description: A zone is one room's matched temperature + humidity pair. Zones added so far: {count}. Tick 'Add another' to keep adding.

abort.already_configured: This bridge address, port and slave address are already configured.

data_description.strategy: Wettest = report the highest-humidity zone's matched temperature & humidity. Mean/median aggregate across zones.
data_description.max_age: A zone whose sensor hasn't updated within this time is ignored (guards against a stuck sensor).
